column49: \"Purpose and Context Displays the Sun* Annual Awards brand identity image at the top of the login screen.  Display Elements:   - Image: Sun* Annual Awards logo (static asset)  Function & Logic:   - Static display only; no user interaction.   - State: Always visible; no loading or error state defined in the design.\"
column70: \"- Condition: The selected value is not in the list of supported languages.   Error: \"\"Invalid language selection.\"\"\"
column71: \"Purpose and Context Allows the user to change the display language of the application before logging in.  Display Elements:   - Flag Icon: Vietnam flag (default state)   - Label: \"\"VN\"\" (current language code)   - Icon: Dropdown arrow indicating expandable options  Function & Logic:   - Click: Opens a dropdown list of available language options.   - On Select: Updates the language code label and flag icon to the newly selected language; re-renders all UI text in the selected language.   - Default Value: \"\"VN\"\" (Vietnamese) pre-selected.   - State: Always enabled on the login screen.\"
column73: \"Opens a dropdown list of supported language options for the user to select.\"
column76: \"Likely stored in local storage or user preferences; exact persistence mechanism not specified in the design.\"
column93: \"Purpose and Context Static brand tagline text element displayed on the login screen as part of the visual identity.  Display Elements:   - Label: \"\"ROOT FURTHER\"\"  Function & Logic:   - Static display only; no user interaction.   - Content is fixed and does not change based on user input or language selection.\"
column115: \"Purpose and Context Introductory description text displayed on the login screen to guide Sunners before they authenticate.  Display Elements:   - Label: \"\"Start your journey with SAA 2025. Log in to explore!\"\" (localized text; Vietnamese: \"\"Bắt đầu hành trình của bạn cùng SAA 2025. Đăng nhập để khám phá!\"\")  Function & Logic:   - Static display only; no user interaction.   - Content should update when the language selection is changed.\"
column137: \"Purpose and Context Primary call-to-action button on the login screen that initiates Google OAuth authentication for Sun* employees.  Display Elements:   - Label: \"\"LOGIN With Google\"\"   - Icon: Google logo icon displayed to the right of the label  Function & Logic:   - Click: Triggers the Google OAuth consent/authentication flow.   - On success: Navigates user to the main dashboard (Home screen).   - On failure (auth error or network error): Displays an error message to the user (exact message to be confirmed).   - State: Always enabled; no disable condition required before click.   - Double-click prevention: Should be implemented to avoid duplicate auth requests.   - Loading state: A loading spinner or disabled state should be shown while authentication is in progress (to be confirmed).\"
column139: \"Initiates Google OAuth authentication flow; on success navigates to the main dashboard (Home screen).\"
column159: \"Purpose and Context Static copyright notice displayed at the bottom of the login screen.  Display Elements:   - Label: \"\"Copyright belongs to Sun* © 2025\"\" (Vietnamese: \"\"Bản quyền thuộc về Sun* © 2025\"\")  Function & Logic:   - Static display only; no user interaction.   - Content should update when the language selection is changed (if localization is applied).\"
